Falling Fruit record for Common fig.
3709 Chamblee Dunwoody Rd, Chamblee, GA 30341, USA

Located right outside the fence of Chamblee High School by the corner of Mendenhall St. and very close to the road—be careful harvesting. Persimmon grows right next to a large water oak and is very missable. Fruit is mostly in the trees and difficult to reach,
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
